reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio y calidad humana! Pasamos la noche y nos encontramos con una grata sorpresa, a pesar de estar transitando una pandemia fue una muy buena estadía, se manejan con todos protocolos !

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and friendly staff! We spent the night and were pleasantly surprised. Despite the pandemic, it was a very good stay, and they follow all the protocols!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTaTVuVmZBEAE

reviews.comment:
La estación es vieja y la parte de bar / confitería esta desprovista (ofrecen usar el comedor que no es muy útil si uno quiere simplemente tomar un cafe y comer un sandwich para seguir viaje).

(Translated by Google)
The station is old and the bar/confectionery area is bare (they offer to use the dining room which is not very useful if you just want to have a coffee and a sandwich to continue your journey).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTenFuZTNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. El acceso y la salida son un tanto difíciles por el sitio donde se halla ubicado, sobre todo accediendo desde el oeste. Ir atentos a la señalización.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Access and exit are somewhat difficult due to its location, especially coming from the west. Pay attention to the signs.
